overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk along a sunlit Los Angeles-style city street. The camera moves past an art deco parking garage, continues along a palm-tree-lined sidewalk with residential buildings, and approaches an urban intersection with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with art deco parking structure and palm trees

events.description: crosses from street side onto the tree-lined sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and crossing onto the sidewalk while passing the art deco parking garage

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with distinctive vertical architectural details and external staircases
tall palm trees lining the street between the road and sidewalk
white multi-story residential building with balconies and modern facade
classic black street lamp post with ornate design

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a distinctive art deco parking garage on the left side of a sunlit urban street. The camera walks forward along the road, passing palm trees, then transitions onto a concrete sidewalk lined with a white residential building on the right. The street is relatively empty with only occasional cars passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential sidewalk with street furniture

events.description: large white city bus passes by on the street heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential buildings and street trees

notable_agents.action: white city bus driving past on the street

entered.detail: blue USPS postal mailbox on the sidewalk near the curb
white public transit bus with advertising on the side

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded sidewalk lined with mature trees and white residential buildings. A large city bus passes by on the street, and the camera continues past a blue postal mailbox. The art deco parking garage from the previous segment disappears behind as the walk continues through this residential zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with pedestrian seating area

events.description: passing two pedestrians seated on a bench on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and passing pedestrians seated on a bench

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians sitting on a bench, one wearing blue shorts

entered.detail: concrete bench on the sidewalk where two people are seated
blue recycling bins placed against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the residential sidewalk, passing two pedestrians seated on a concrete bench. Blue trash bins are visible against the building wall. The white apartment building continues along the right side while palm trees provide shade on the left. Vehicle traffic remains light with occasional cars passing on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and mixed traffic

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection and continuing along the sidewalk as traffic passes by

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street from left to right at the intersection

entered.detail: large street intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic from multiple directions
contemporary white office building with flat roof across the street
glass and metal bus shelter at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider urban intersection with increased traffic including a black sports car and a city bus. A modern office building becomes visible across the street on the left. The camera approaches the crosswalk area where a pedestrian crosses the street. The white apartment building recedes into the distance on the right as the walk continues toward the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a sunlit urban street that transitions from a quiet residential stretch into a bustling city intersection. It begins by passing a distinctive art deco parking garage on the left before moving onto a concrete sidewalk lined with white residential buildings and towering palm trees. As the camera progresses through this shaded zone, it passes a blue postal mailbox and a large city bus, eventually gliding past pedestrians resting on a concrete bench near blue trash bins. The scene then opens up as the residential architecture recedes, shifting toward a wider intersection filled with increased traffic, including a black sports car and another bus. Finally, the camera approaches a crosswalk where a pedestrian crosses the street, with a modern office building coming into view across the road.
